# Contributing to ShakeUp

Thanks for wanting to contribute! Here's how to get started.

## Development Setup
See [Getting Started](README.md#getting-started) in the README.

## Workflow
1. Fork the repo and create a branch off `main`
2. Follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org)
   for commit messages (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, etc.)
3. Make sure `npm run lint` and `npm run typecheck` pass
4. Open a PR against `main` with a clear description of the change

## Reporting Bugs / Requesting Features
Use the issue templates — they help us triage faster.

## Code Style
[Add specifics once you settle on lint/format tooling — e.g. ESLint + Prettier config]

## License
By contributing, you agree your contributions are licensed under
the project's GPLv3 license.
